text: I feel a sense of curiosity awakening in me as I stand before this glass-walled room, peering into an exhibit that seems devoted to research and development. The vibrant blues and oranges remind me of a playful seriousness—an invitation to both rigorous experimentation and creative thought. In this environment, surrounded by symbols of knowledge and innovation, I experience a gentle anticipation, eager to discover new ideas and insights about how humans strive to connect and transform the world.
